name: Tex Mex Mac & Cheese
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Ground beef, or ground turkey
1 package Macaroni and cheese, or Velveeta and Shells
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, brown the ground beef or turkey with the chopped bell pepper, onion, and mushrooms.
2. Stir in the tomato paste and water. Add the corn.
3. Cook the macaroni and cheese according to package directions, adding milk and margarine if required.
4. Mix the cooked macaroni and cheese into the beef mixture.
5. Combine well and serve.
